name: Pumpkin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the shortening and brown sugar. Cream together until smooth.
2. Add the eggs to the mixture and mix well.
3. Stir in the pumpkin puree.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt, ginger, cinnamon, nutmeg) to the wet mixture. Mix until just combined.
5. Fold in the raisins and chopped nuts.
6. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
